pi_items.source: Confirmed in task.json metadata, task.json description (line 5), and export_result.sh (line 35). Path is consistently used for storing the agent's security audit report output.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a security audit of the Nx Witness VMS system (a real, publicly available video management system from Network Optix). The system runs on the default port 7001 (https://localhost:7001). The task requires the agent to identify camera coverage gaps by analyzing system state via the REST API and generate a JSON report output to /home/ga/coverage_gap_report.json. The environment data (cameras, users, layouts) is synthetic, created by setup scripts that configure specific gaps for testing. The system uses bearer token authentication with the /rest/v1/login/sessions endpoint. The task does not involve any real surveillance data or actual deployed systems.
